Price Reveal Auction Software

Home › Auction Software › Price Reveal Auction

PRICE REVEAL · SHIPPED SINCE 2011

Price-reveal auctions — the format that turns every bid into a discovery moment.

Players pay a small fee to reveal the current auction price. The price moves on a configurable curve; the player who chooses to commit at the right price wins. Shipped in the UK (TopEncheres), Singapore (uBidUBuy), and across multiple European markets — engineered for the latency-sensitive reveal interaction.

Get a Free Technical Proposal Back to Auction Pillar →

PRODUCTION DEPLOYMENTS

Where we have shipped the price reveal auction format.

  • uBidUBuy.sg · Singapore
  • TopEncheres · France
  • YouBid · multi-market
  • SubastasGamer · gaming vertical

FEATURES WE SHIP

The six features every price reveal auction operator needs.

Configurable price curves

Price-reveal curve is operator-configurable: linear, stepped, exponential. Each auction can use a different curve. No code release required.

Low-latency reveal interaction

The reveal-the-price interaction has to feel instant. Edge caching + WebSocket fan-out keeps the reveal under 200ms even at peak load.

Commit-to-win mechanic

After revealing, the player can commit or skip. Commit locks in the price; skip costs only the reveal fee. State machine prevents double-commits.

Reveal-fee + commit-fee economics

Per-reveal fee + per-commit fee, both configurable. Wallet top-up via the major payment gateways.

Anti-griefing controls

Velocity limits on reveals (a single player can't spam-reveal a price curve into the floor). Cooldowns between reveals are operator-configurable.

Operator analytics

Reveal/commit funnel per auction, price-curve performance, player engagement distribution, P&L per auction.

TECH STACK

What we use for price reveal auction builds.

Node.js + TypeScript + WebSocket for low-latency reveal · Redis for shared reveal state · PostgreSQL for durable bid record · Stripe + regional payment gateways

/ Price Reveal Auction format
